prompt: A narrow path disappearing into dense jungle foliage with low-hanging mist. Ambient sourceless green light filtering through leaves. Wet surfaces — water droplets on leaves, damp earth path. Deep green and dark blue palette with a single warm amber glow deep in the background, origin unknown. The atmosphere feels thick and humid. Dreamlike, liminal, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
